headline: Blackstone's QTS secures upsized $3.25B leveraged loan
summary: QTS (Project Magnolia) has wrapped its $3.25 billion term loan B, according to sources. The seven-year term loan priced at S+225, with a 0% floor and an OID of 99.5, at the tight end of price talk at launch. JPMorgan is the administrative agent on the deal, and led a bookrunner group that included Morgan Stanley and Wells Fargo. The deal was upsized twice, with the facility originally sized at $1 billion. Proceeds will be used to repay existing debt under construction credit facilities, fund a d

headline: Oppenheimer Maintains Outperform on Blackstone, Lowers Price Target to $139
summary: Oppenheimer  analyst Christopher Kotowski   maintains Blackstone (NYSE:BX) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $156 to $139.

headline: Is Blackstone (BX) Quietly Rewriting Its AI and Infrastructure Playbook With Ode and India?
summary: Earlier this week, Anthropic, Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman and a consortium of global investors formally launched Ode with Anthropic, an AI services company built on Fractional AI’s team and Anthropic’s frontier models to help enterprises deploy advanced AI systems. In parallel, Blackstone broadened its alternatives footprint in Asia-Pacific by hiring Ami Momaya as its first dedicated infrastructure head for India, marking the launch of its infrastructure platform in the country. We’ll now...
